title: stenaria mullerae var. pooleana
intro: Stenaria mullerae var. pooleana, also known as Mexican chamomile, is a perennial herb that belongs to the family Commelinaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used to treat a variety of ailments due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stenaria mullerae var. pooleana include reducing anxiety and insomnia, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
